name: CROSS_NEW_ENTRANT_ASSIGNEES_BY_TARGETPAIR_AFTER_YEAR
description: New entrant assignees for target pair after a year.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee), (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH tp, a, min(y.year) AS first_year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
WHERE first_year > $year
RETURN a.name AS assignee, first_year, patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 20;

examples: 某target pair在2022年后有哪些new entrants？
